'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 68''' was the sixty-eighth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[April 16]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]
*[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]]
*[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]
*[[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] - [[Superlaser Fire Control|Control Room]]
*[[SE4 servant droid|SE4 Servant Droid]]
*[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsaber]]
*[[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Trade Federation Battleship Core]]
